---
name: resolve-issue
description: This prompt is used to resolve a GitHub issue by implementing the required changes in the codebase.
agent: Coder
argument-hint: Provide the issue number and a brief description of the changes needed to resolve the issue.
---

# Resolve Issue

## Task
Resolve the specified issue by programming the solution.

## Context
If no issue number is provided, use the first open issue in the repository.
